title: Wins and Achievements
description: Discover President Trump's second term triumphs: a surging economy with record jobs and growth, ironclad border security slashing illegal crossings, and bold investments fueling AI and tech innovation. America's comeback—explore now!
text: Foreign Policy U.S. seized a sanctioned tanker off Venezuela and imposed new sanctions on Maduro‑linked vessels and entities. Strengthens sanctions enforcement and maritime rule of law in the region. Foreign Policy China banned all 13 fentanyl precursors under Trump pressure; Kazakhstan joined Abraham Accords after Netanyahu/Tokayev call. Breakthrough trade deals with El Salvador, Argentina, Ecuador, Guatemala for streamlined market access. Advances Middle East peace via Syrian President hosting; Nigeria declared ‘country of particular concern’ for Christian persecution; strengthens Western Hemisphere ties. Economy Anthropic $50B U.S. AI infrastructure investment; Meta $1B AI data center in Wisconsin; Cencora $1B supply chain commitment. $2,000 tariff-funded dividends for low/middle-income Americans; Eli Lilly/Novo Nordisk join ‘most favored nation’ pricing for drastic discounts. Private payrolls up 42K beating expectations; Thanksgiving meal costs down 2-3% YoY (Walmart cheapest since 2019); wages climbing as prices steady per DoorDash; $1.25B Bangladesh soybean purchases secured. Border Security CBP reports zero releases at border for 6th straight month (lowest October encounters ever); 100+ H-1B visa abuse investigations launched via Operation Firewall. Massive Western Washington drug/gun network dismantled. Protects American jobs from visa exploitation; tens of thousands of fentanyl pills & dozens of illegal guns seized; lowest fiscal year start on record. Other Signed bill reopening government after Democrat shutdown; $10K bonuses for TSA agents who worked through it. Historic Cornell settlement: $30M to U.S. ag, $30M to gov, civil rights compliance. Relieves millions from shutdown pain; BBC leaders resign over doctored Jan 6 speech; one-year election anniversary celebrated with reopened White House tours.
